summary: Frontend testing completed for bug fixes: Pipeline page JSX fix, AdvancedBlockEditor dropdown text visibility, and Documents page preview/rename features. All tests PASSED.
critical_code_review_comments: Theme toggle (light/dark) is documented as NOT FIXED - requires complete CSS refactoring as all components use hardcoded colors like bg-[#1a1a2e], text-white
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fixes verified: 1) PipelinePage.jsx loads without JSX errors, 2) AdvancedBlockEditor dropdown menus show text correctly with text-white class, 3) DocumentsPage has working preview and rename features. Theme toggle NOT tested as it requires CSS refactoring.

pipeline_page_jsx_fix.details: Pipeline page loads correctly with 7 columns, no JSX parsing errors. The unclosed div tags at lines 1191-1194 have been fixed.

block_editor_dropdown_text.details: Add block dropdown shows all block types with visible white text: Texte, Titre, Liste, Citation, Image, Galerie, Vidéo, Avant/Après, Séparateur, Espace, Section couleur, Statistiques, Bouton CTA

block_editor_heading_level_selector.details: Heading level selector (H1-H4) dropdown shows all options with visible white text

documents_page_preview.details: Clicking on a document opens preview modal showing file info (Taille, Type, Date, Format) and action buttons (Télécharger, Renommer, Supprimer)

documents_page_rename_from_preview.details: Clicking 'Renommer' button in preview modal opens rename dialog with input field pre-filled with current filename

documents_page_folder_context_menu.details: Folder context menu shows 'Ouvrir', 'Renommer', 'Supprimer' options with visible text

pipeline_page.glassmorphic_design: PASS - Dark theme with transparent backgrounds

realisations_page.new_project_form: PASS - Opens correctly with block editor
realisations_page.add_block_dropdown: PASS - All block types visible with white text
realisations_page.heading_level_selector: PASS - H1-H4 options visible with white text

documents_page.file_preview: PASS - Preview modal opens on file click
documents_page.rename_from_preview: PASS - Rename modal opens from preview

known_issues_not_tested.theme_toggle: NOT TESTED - Main agent noted this requires complete CSS refactoring as all components use hardcoded dark theme colors
